summary: Backend testing for multi-tenant Arabic POS bug fixes iteration 134. All 12 tests passed. Fixed a critical bug: PaymentMethod.CREDIT was missing from shared.py causing cash register summary 500 error.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: PaymentMethod.CREDIT was missing from /app/backend/routes/shared.py causing AttributeError in cash-register/summary endpoint
shifts_routes.py line 564: expenses query correctly includes tenant_id via expense_query['tenant_id'] = tenant_id
customer_menu.py line 360: notification creation on customer order working correctly
order_notifications.py line 177: 60 minute cutoff implemented correctly
server.py lines 17111-17164: accept/reject order endpoints working - sets status to confirmed/cancelled
server.py lines 16300-16329: assign-driver includes driver_name and driver_phone in update
customer_menu.py lines 445-452: status timeline includes confirmed step
inventory_system.py line 617: raw-materials-new creates material with tenant_id
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Category, TEST_Product, TEST_Driver for testing accept/reject orders and driver assignment
context_for_next_testing_agent: All bug fixes verified working. Fixed PaymentMethod.CREDIT missing attribute. Cash register summary, accept/reject orders, notifications, driver assignment, raw materials with tenant_id, and sales report all working correctly.

cash_register_summary_500_error.issue: PaymentMethod.CREDIT attribute was missing from shared.py
cash_register_summary_500_error.fix: Added CREDIT = 'credit' and PENDING = 'pending' to PaymentMethod class

expenses_query_tenant_id.evidence: expense_query includes tenant_id filtering at line 414

customer_order_notifications.evidence: notification_doc created with type 'new_order_cashier' at line 357

accept_reject_orders.evidence: POST /api/notifications/accept-order sets status to 'confirmed', reject sets to 'cancelled'

driver_assignment_name_phone.evidence: Update includes driver_name and driver_phone from driver document

order_status_timeline_confirmed.evidence: status_timeline includes confirmed step at line 447

sales_report_excludes_refunded.evidence: Query includes status $nin [cancelled, refunded] AND is_refunded $ne True
